description: A temperature slider useful for controlling randomness in model outputs. Lower values (0.0-0.3) produce very deterministic outputs ideal for factual content, code, or documentation. Medium values (0.4-0.7) balance creativity and coherence for general conversation and controlled creative writing. Higher values (0.8-1.0) introduce more randomness for brainstorming, poetry, and ideation. Values above 1.0 become very random and may be incoherent, suitable only for experimental purposes.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Optional value to override the default temperature value.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: The temperature value (0-1 by default, or 0-2 if experimental mode is enabled). Lower values (0.0-0.3) are very deterministic, ideal for factual or technical outputs. Medium values (0.4-0.7) balance creativity and coherence. Higher values (0.8-1.0) are highly creative for brainstorming or ideation. Values above 1.0 can become incoherent.

settings.name: value
settings.description: The temperature value to output. Controls randomness in model outputs: 0.0-0.3 for very deterministic outputs (factual, technical, code), 0.4-0.7 for balanced creativity (general conversation, controlled creative writing), 0.8-1.0 for high creativity (brainstorming, poetry, ideation), and above 1.0 for experimental use (may be incoherent).

settings.name: allow_experimental
settings.description: If enabled, allows temperature values above 1.0 (up to 2.0). Values above 1.0 can become very random and incoherent, suitable only for experimental purposes.
